title: Unsure how to approach CS50? Carter Zenke answers.
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming offered through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare. The course is led by David J. Malan and maintains an active community across multiple social platforms including Discord, GitHub, Reddit, and Slack.
writeup: CS50 instructor Carter Zenke addresses how to approach Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming. The course, led by David J. Malan, is offered through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, which gives multiple entry points depending on enrollment context. It maintains an active community across Discord, GitHub, Reddit, and Slack, so support extends beyond the lectures themselves.
